scriptField.name: C_S_MOBINO7
scriptField.script: def mobi = input.get("S_S_MOBINO"); if(null != mobi && mobi.length()>=7){ return mobi.substring(0,7); }else{ return mobi; }

scriptField.name: C_S_IDNO6
scriptField.script: def idNo = input.get("S_S_CERTID"); if(null != idNo && idNo.length()>=6){ return idNo.substring(0,6); }else{ return idNo; }

scriptField.name: C_S_MOBINO3
scriptField.script: def mobi = input.get("S_S_MOBINO"); if(null != mobi && mobi.length()>=3){ return mobi.substring(0,3); }else{ return mobi; }

scriptField.name: C_N_IDNOAGE
scriptField.script: def birthday=input.get("S_S_CERTID"); if(birthday!=null && birthday.length()>=10) { int year=Integer.parseInt(birthday.substring(6,10)); SimpleDateFormat sdf_convert = new SimpleDateFormat("yyyy"); return Integer.parseInt(sdf_convert.format(new Date()))-year; } else {return -1;}

scriptField.name: C_S_IDNOSEX
scriptField.script: def idNo = input.get("S_S_CERTID"); if(null != idNo  && idNo.length()>=17){ def sex = idNo.substring(16,17) as int ; if (sex % 2 ==1){ return "1"; } else { return "2"; } }

scriptField.name: C_S_EVENTDATE
scriptField.script: def time = input.get("S_D_BIZTIME"); if(null != time && time.length() >= 10){ return time.substring(0,10); }

scriptField.name: C_N_EVENTMONTH
scriptField.script: def time = input.get("S_D_BIZTIME"); if(null != time && time.length() >= 7){ return time.substring(5,7).toInteger(); }else{ return  -1; }

scriptField.name: C_N_EVENTHOUR
scriptField.script: def time = input.get("S_D_BIZTIME"); if(null != time && time.length() >= 13){ return time.substring(11,13).toInteger(); } else {return  -1;}

scriptField.name: C_S_IS5000INT
scriptField.script: def vamount = input.get("S_F_AMOUNT"); if(vamount != null && vamount.length()>0){ double balanceDouble = Double.parseDouble(vamount); double resAmount = balanceDouble / (Math.round(balanceDouble / 5000.0) * 5000.0); if(resAmount >= 0.95 && resAmount <=1.05) { return 1; } else { return 0; } }

scriptField.name: C_S_IS1000INT
scriptField.script: def vamount = input.get("S_F_AMOUNT"); if(vamount != null && vamount.length()>0){ double balanceDouble = Double.parseDouble(vamount); double resAmount = balanceDouble / (Math.round(balanceDouble / 1000.0) * 1000.0); if(resAmount >= 0.95 && resAmount <=1.05) { return 1; } else { return 0; } }

scriptField.name: C_S_IS100INT
scriptField.script: def vamount = input.get("S_F_AMOUNT"); if(vamount != null && vamount.length() > 0){ double balanceDouble = Double.parseDouble(vamount); double resAmount = balanceDouble / (Math.round(balanceDouble / 100.0) * 100.0); if(resAmount >= 0.95 && resAmount <=1.05) { return 1; } else { return 0; } }

scriptField.name: C_S_IS10INT
scriptField.script: def vamount = input.get("S_F_AMOUNT"); if(vamount != null && vamount.length() > 0){ double balanceDouble = Double.parseDouble(vamount); double resAmount = balanceDouble / (Math.round(balanceDouble / 10.0) * 10.0); if(resAmount >= 0.95 && resAmount <=1.05) { return 1; } else { return 0; } }

scriptField.name: C_S_IS50000INT
scriptField.script: def vamount = input.get("S_F_AMOUNT"); if(vamount != null && vamount.length()>0){ double balanceDouble = Double.parseDouble(vamount); double resAmount = balanceDouble / (Math.round(balanceDouble / 50000.0) * 50000.0); if(resAmount >= 0.95 && resAmount <=1.05) { return 1; } else { return 0; } }

scriptField.name: C_S_AMOUNTSPECIFIC
scriptField.script: def vamount = input.get("S_F_AMOUNT"); def singleIndex = vamount.indexOf("."); def vamount1 = Integer.parseInt(vamount.substring(singleIndex + 1, singleIndex + 2)); def vamount2 = Integer.parseInt(vamount.substring(singleIndex + 2, singleIndex + 3)); def vamount3 = Integer.parseInt(vamount.substring(singleIndex - 1, singleIndex)); if (singleIndex >= 0 && vamount.length() >= (singleIndex + 3)){ if(vamount1 != 0 && vamount2 != 0 && vamount2 == vamount1){ return 1; } else if(vamount3 == vamount1) { return 1; } else { return 0; }}

scriptField.name: C_S_IS30INT
scriptField.script: def vamount = input.get("S_F_AMOUNT"); if(vamount != null && vamount.length() > 0){ double balanceDouble = Double.parseDouble(vamount); double resAmount = balanceDouble / (Math.round(balanceDouble / 30.0) * 30.0); if(resAmount >= 0.95 && resAmount <=1.05) { return 1; } else { return 0; } }

scriptField.name: C_S_IS5INT
scriptField.script: def vamount = input.get("S_F_AMOUNT"); if(vamount != null && vamount.length() > 0){ double balanceDouble = Double.parseDouble(vamount); double resAmount = balanceDouble / (Math.round(balanceDouble / 5.0) * 5.0); if(resAmount >= 0.95 && resAmount <=1.05) { return 1; } else { return 0; } }

scriptField.name: C_S_MOBINO10
scriptField.script: def mobi = input.get("S_S_MOBINO"); if(null != mobi && mobi.length()>=10){ return mobi.substring(0,10); }else{ return mobi; }

scriptField.name: C_S_ISGIVENAMOUNT
scriptField.script: def vamount = input.get("S_F_AMOUNT"); if (vamount != null){ def singleIndex = vamount.indexOf("."); if (singleIndex >= 0 && vamount.length() >= (singleIndex + 3)){ def decimalValue = Integer.parseInt(vamount.substring(singleIndex + 1, singleIndex + 3)); def singleValue = Integer.parseInt(vamount.substring(singleIndex - 1, singleIndex)); if ((singleValue == 4 || singleValue == 9) && (decimalValue >= 91 && decimalValue <= 99)){ return 1; }else{ return 0; } }else{ return 0; } }

scriptField.name: C_F_SINGLELIMIT9
scriptField.script: def tradelimit = input.get("S_F_SINGLELIMIT") ; if (null != tradelimit) { def balanceD = Double.parseDouble(tradelimit); return balanceD * 0.9; }

scriptField.name: C_F_DAYAMOUNT9
scriptField.script: def amount = input.get("S_F_DAILYAMT"); if(null != amount){ def amountD = Double.parseDouble(amount); return amountD*0.85; }
